title: Eggstra Additions
description: Adds new food items that can be crafted with eggs.
body:
Egg Additions adds new uses for the different types of eggs.

# New Cakes
New cakes you can craft by using different types of eggs!

Three cakes can be crafted with this format:

![Birthday cake recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd3fdf4888aeee999f5478e7faac0803fadd0889.png)
